title: Foil Retirement Balloon - 45 cm - Colourful Dots Design
features: Foil balloon measures 45 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Ideal for decorating a retirement party
Self-sealing balloon can be filled with helium or air via hand pump
Combine with other party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Congratulate a retiree with our Foil Colourful Dots Retirement Balloon. Featuring a vibrant mix of colourful polka dots, this 45 centimetre balloon is ideal for celebrating the start of a new chapter. It can be pumped up with helium or air and self-seals for easy inflation. Use the balloon solo as a centrepiece on a on a party table, or create a DIY balloon bouquet. Add extra charm to the festivities with more retirement party supplies. Safety Warning Warning. Do not use near overhead powerlines or during thunderstorms. Caution. Not intended for release. Dispose of properly. Never use metallic ribbon with balloons. This balloon may conduct electricity. Misuse can cause personal injury. Attach a non-metallic ribbon and balloon weight.
